---
title: "survivoR Package Exploration"
author: "Jimmy Winslow"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_notebook
---

# survivoR Data Exploration

One-time exploration of the `survivoR` R package to understand available
datasets, column names, row counts, and data quality before building the
Python ingestion pipeline.

## Setup
```{r setup}
library(survivoR)
library(readr)
```

## Load All Datasets
```{r load}
data(season_summary)
data(castaways)
data(castaway_details)
data(vote_history)
data(challenge_results)
data(challenge_description)
data(advantage_details)
data(advantage_movement)
data(confessionals)
data(tribe_colours)
data(tribe_mapping)
data(boot_order)
data(jury_votes)
data(episodes)
```

## Data Availability Check
```{r availability}
cat("=== Row Counts ===\n\n")
cat("season_summary:       ", nrow(season_summary), "\n")
cat("castaways:            ", nrow(castaways), "\n")
cat("castaway_details:     ", nrow(castaway_details), "\n")
cat("vote_history:         ", nrow(vote_history), "\n")
cat("challenge_results:    ", nrow(challenge_results), "\n")
cat("challenge_description:", nrow(challenge_description), "\n")
cat("advantage_details:    ", nrow(advantage_details), "\n")
cat("advantage_movement:   ", nrow(advantage_movement), "\n")
cat("confessionals:        ", nrow(confessionals), "\n")
cat("tribe_colours:        ", nrow(tribe_colours), "\n")
cat("tribe_mapping:        ", nrow(tribe_mapping), "\n")
cat("boot_order:           ", nrow(boot_order), "\n")
cat("jury_votes:           ", nrow(jury_votes), "\n")
cat("episodes:             ", nrow(episodes), "\n")

cat("\n=== Season Coverage ===\n\n")
cat("castaways:    S", min(castaways$season), "to S", max(castaways$season), "\n")
cat("vote_history: S", min(vote_history$season), "to S", max(vote_history$season), "\n")
cat("tribe_mapping:S", min(tribe_mapping$season), "to S", max(tribe_mapping$season), "\n")
```

## Column Names
```{r columns}
cat("season_summary:       ", paste(names(season_summary), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("castaways:            ", paste(names(castaways), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("castaway_details:     ", paste(names(castaway_details), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("vote_history:         ", paste(names(vote_history), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("challenge_results:    ", paste(names(challenge_results), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("challenge_description:", paste(names(challenge_description), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("advantage_details:    ", paste(names(advantage_details), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("advantage_movement:   ", paste(names(advantage_movement), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("confessionals:        ", paste(names(confessionals), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("tribe_colours:        ", paste(names(tribe_colours), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("tribe_mapping:        ", paste(names(tribe_mapping), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("boot_order:           ", paste(names(boot_order), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("jury_votes:           ", paste(names(jury_votes), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
cat("episodes:             ", paste(names(episodes), collapse=", "), "\n\n")
```

## Key Observations
```{r observations}
# Season 50 castaways already present
cat("S50 castaways:", nrow(castaways[castaways$season == 50,]), "\n")

# Vote history only through S49
cat("Max season in vote_history:", max(vote_history$season), "\n")

# tribe_mapping is our tribe_memberships table
cat("tribe_mapping columns:", paste(names(tribe_mapping), collapse=", "), "\n")
cat("This is our tribe_memberships table — player x episode x tribe grain\n")

# challenge_description has 40+ component flags
challenge_cols <- names(challenge_description)
component_cols <- challenge_cols[!challenge_cols %in% 
  c("version","version_season","season","episode","challenge_id",
    "challenge_number","challenge_type","name","recurring_name",
    "all_names","description","reward","additional_stipulation")]
cat("\nChallenge component flags (", length(component_cols), "):\n")
cat(paste(component_cols, collapse=", "), "\n")
```

## Schema Mapping Notes
```{r mapping_notes}
# Document how survivoR datasets map to our DB tables
notes <- c(
  "season_summary      -> seasons table",
  "castaways           -> players table (game outcome fields)",
  "castaway_details    -> players table (demographic fields)",
  "tribe_colours       -> tribes table",
  "tribe_mapping       -> tribe_memberships table (already episode-grain!)",
  "episodes            -> episodes table",
  "vote_history        -> votes + tribal_councils tables",
  "challenge_results   -> challenge_participants table",
  "challenge_description -> challenges table",
  "advantage_details   -> advantages table (type/location/conditions)",
  "advantage_movement  -> advantages table (lifecycle events)",
  "confessionals       -> confessionals table",
  "jury_votes          -> advantages + player outcome fields",
  "boot_order          -> supplements castaways boot_episode field"
)
cat(paste(notes, collapse="\n"), "\n")
```

## Export to CSV
```{r export}
out_dir <- "data/survivoR_exports"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

write_csv(season_summary,        file.path(out_dir, "season_summary.csv"))
write_csv(castaways,             file.path(out_dir, "castaways.csv"))
write_csv(castaway_details,      file.path(out_dir, "castaway_details.csv"))
write_csv(vote_history,          file.path(out_dir, "vote_history.csv"))
write_csv(challenge_results,     file.path(out_dir, "challenge_results.csv"))
write_csv(challenge_description, file.path(out_dir, "challenge_description.csv"))
write_csv(advantage_details,     file.path(out_dir, "advantage_details.csv"))
write_csv(advantage_movement,    file.path(out_dir, "advantage_movement.csv"))
write_csv(confessionals,         file.path(out_dir, "confessionals.csv"))
write_csv(tribe_colours,         file.path(out_dir, "tribe_colours.csv"))
write_csv(tribe_mapping,         file.path(out_dir, "tribe_mapping.csv"))
write_csv(boot_order,            file.path(out_dir, "boot_order.csv"))
write_csv(jury_votes,            file.path(out_dir, "jury_votes.csv"))
write_csv(episodes,              file.path(out_dir, "episodes.csv"))

cat("Export complete. Files:\n")
for (f in list.files(out_dir)) {
    cat(" ", f, "-", file.size(file.path(out_dir, f)), "bytes\n")
}
```
